economic_notes: Band operates Ashcroft Indian Band Development LLP (99.99% owned GBE) with revenue of $7,277,201 and net income of $265,936 for 2021. LLP has cumulative partners deficiency of $1,070,126. Band guaranteed LLP bank loan of $2,940,269. Band has unused credit facility of $50,000.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to inability to determine appropriate accounting treatment for investment in Nlaka'pamux Resources Limited Partnership (cost vs modified equity). Prior year comparative figures restated (Note 17) due to $4,157,715 in capital purchases incorrectly recorded in 2019, affecting deferred revenue, accounts receivable and accumulated surplus. Ashcroft Indian Band Development LLP is a GBE accounted for under modified equity method with cumulative partners deficiency of $1,070,126 - no equity loss recorded on Band statements. Fiscal year is 2021 not 2024 as stated in document. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC net ($1,734,253 - $32,547 + $160,573) + FNHA ($371,567) + Province of BC ($679,305) = $2,913,151. expenses_education includes Post Secondary Education $178,087 + Education $10,564 + FNESC New Paths $15,483 + Summer Student $31,451 + FNESC Innovations in Education $19,159 = $254,744 plus New Relationship Trust $32,200 noted separately. No remuneration schedule included in document.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
